title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 19 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 19 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 19 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 19/02/2024
DCE iron ore futures open higher and go lower, fluctuate tight by 0.52% in a day. On the first opening day after the Spring Festival, the market was weak and traders showed average enthusiasm for shipping. Steel mills are also mostly wait-and-see, and overall market transactions are poor.
